samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a pulse detection unit. The input signal data_in is a continuous signal, triggered by clk. When "data_in" changes from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles), this is considered a "pulse". The indicating signal data_out is 1 at the end cycle of the "pulse", and returns to 0 until the corresponding pulse appears again.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="s0">Initial state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s1">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s2">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s3">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s4">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s5">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s6">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s7">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s8">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s9">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s10">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s11">Detecting a pulse.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Describe the state register and its update logic.</description>
            <register id="state" width_description="[11:0]">State register.</register>
            <register id="next_state" width_description="[11:0]">Next state register.</register>
            <register id="data_out" width_description="[11:0]">Output register.</register>
            <register id="next_data_out" width_description="[11:0]">Next output register.</register>
            <always>
                <sensitivity_list>
                    <item>clk</item>
                    <item>rst_n</item>
                </sensitivity_list>
                <description>State transition logic.</description>
                <if>
                    <condition>~rst_n</condition>
                    <true>
                        <assignment>state <= s0;</assignment>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <assignment>state <= next_state;</assignment>
                    </false>
                </if>
            </always>
            <always>
                <sensitivity_list>
                    <item>state</item>
                    <item>data_in</item>
                </sensitivity_list>
                <description>Output logic.</description>
                <if>
                    <condition>~rst_n</condition>
                    <true>
                        <assignment>data_out <= 0;</assignment>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <assignment>data_out <= next_data_out;</assignment>
                    </false>
                </if>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <description>Describe the combinational logic for state transition and output.</description>
            <case>
                <switch>
                    <expression>state</expression>
                    <case_value>s0</case_value>
                    <case_value>s1</case_value>
                    <case_value>s2</case_value>
                    <case_value>s3</case_value>
                    <case_value>s4</case_value>
                    <case_value>s5</case_value>
                    <case_value>s6</case_value>
                    <case_value>s7</case_value>
                    <case_value>s8</case_value>
                    <case_value>s9</case_value>
                    <case_value>s10</case_value>
                    <case_value>s11</case_value>
                </switch>
                <true>
                    <description>State transition logic.</description>
                    <if>
                        <condition>data_in == 1'b0</condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>next_state = state;</assignment>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <assignment>next_state = state + 1;</assignment>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                </true>
            </case>
            <case>
                <switch>
                    <expression>state</expression>
                    <case_value>s0</case_value>
                    <case_value>s1</case_value>
                    <case_value>s2</case_value>
                    <case_value>s3</case_value>
                    <case_value>s4</case_value>
                    <case_value>s5</case_value>
                    <case_value>s6</case_value>
                    <case_value>s7</case_value>
                    <case_value>s8</case_value>
                    <case_value>s9</case_value>
                    <case_value>s10</case_value>
                    <case_value>s11</case_value>
                </switch>
                <true>
                    <description>Output logic.</description>
                    <if>
                        <condition>data_in == 1'b0</condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>next_data_out = 0;</assignment>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <assignment>next_data_out = 1;</assignment>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                </true>
            </case>
        </combinational_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Describe the task for pulse detection.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>state == s11</condition>
            <true>
                <assignment>next_state = s0;</assignment>
            </true>
            <false>
                <assignment>next_state = state;</assignment>
            </false>
        </if>
    </task>
</module>
